projects.title: VIZ-ly (A Dashboard Platform Application)
projects.description: AI Dashboard Builder is a full-stack data visualization web app built with React and FastAPI that allows users to upload datasets (CSV/Excel), preview data, and generate interactive charts. It features a drag-and-drop dashboard builder with resizable components and supports exporting dashboards as images or PDFs, making it a lightweight alternative to tools like Power BI and Tableau.

projects.title: Cal-c (A Upgraded Calculator)
projects.description: A Flutter-based commercial calculator app with GST calculator, temperature converter, profit calculator, and shopkeeper notes using Provider and SharedPreferences.

projects.title: Customer Behaviour Analysis
projects.description: A complete Data Analytics Project focused on understanding customer behaviour through data exploration, cleaning, analysis, and visualization using Python, SQL, Power BI, and Excel.

blogs.title: VIZ-ly (A Dashboard Platform)
blogs.excerpt: AI Dashboard Builder is a full-stack data visualization web app built with React and FastAPI that allows users to upload datasets (CSV/Excel), preview data, and generate interactive charts. It features a drag-and-drop dashboard builder with resizable components and supports exporting dashboards as images or PDFs, making it a lightweight alternative to tools like Power BI and Tableau.
blogs.content:
рҹ“Ҡ AI Dashboard Builder
Build Smart Data Dashboards with React & FastAPI рҹҡҖ

In todayвҖҷs data-driven world, tools like Power BI and Tableau dominate business intelligence. But what if you could build your own versionвҖ”customized, lightweight, and developer-friendly?

ThatвҖҷs exactly what I built: AI Dashboard Builder, a full-stack web application that transforms raw datasets into interactive dashboards in just a few clicks.

рҹ§  Project Overview

AI Dashboard Builder is a data visualization platform that allows users to:

Upload datasets (CSV / Excel)
Preview and understand data instantly
Generate interactive charts
Build fully customizable dashboards
Drag, resize, and rearrange components
Export dashboards as images or PDFs

It simplifies complex analytics workflows into a smooth and intuitive experience.

рҹҺҜ Key Features
рҹ“Ғ Dataset Upload

Upload .csv and .xlsx files with ease.
The backend processes data efficiently using Pandas.

рҹ”Қ Data Preview

Quickly inspect:

Dataset columns
Sample rows
Data structure

This helps users understand the dataset before visualization.

рҹ“Ҳ Dynamic Chart Generation

Automatically generate charts such as:

рҹ“Ҡ Bar Charts
рҹ“ү Line Charts
рҹҘ§ Pie Charts

Powered by Recharts, charts adapt dynamically based on your dataset.

рҹ§© Dashboard Builder

Create your own dashboard with:

Drag & drop functionality
Resizable components
Flexible layout system

Built using React Grid Layout for smooth interactions.

рҹ“Ө Export Options

Download your dashboards as:

рҹ–ј PNG Images
рҹ“„ PDF Reports

Perfect for presentations and reporting.

рҹ’ҫ Save Dashboard (Optional)
Save dashboard layouts
Retrieve them using a unique ID
Enables persistent analytics workflows
рҹҸ—пёҸ Tech Stack
рҹ”№ Frontend
React
React Router
Recharts
React Grid Layout
рҹ”№ Backend
FastAPI
Pandas
Uvicorn
рҹ“Ӯ Project Structure
viz-dashboard-platform/
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җ backend/
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ main.py
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ requirements.txt
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җ frontend/
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ src/
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ components/
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ AutoChart.js
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ pages/
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ UploadDataset.js
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ DataPreview.js
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Visualization.js
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ Dashboard.js
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ App.js
в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җ README.md
вҡҷпёҸ Installation & Setup
рҹ”№ Backend Setup
cd backend
pip install -r requirements.txt
uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000

рҹ“Қ Runs on: http://localhost:8000

рҹ”№ Frontend Setup
cd frontend
npm install
npm start

рҹ“Қ Runs on: http://localhost:3000

рҹ”— API Endpoints
Method	Endpoint	Description
POST	/upload	Upload dataset
GET	/preview	Get dataset preview
POST	/save-dashboard	Save layout
GET	/dashboard/{id}	Load saved dashboard
рҹ”„ Application Workflow
Upload Dataset
      вҶ“
Preview Data
      вҶ“
Generate Charts
      вҶ“
Build Dashboard
      вҶ“
Export / Save Dashboard
рҹ’Ў Use Cases

This platform can be used for:

рҹ“Ҡ Business analytics dashboards
рҹҺ“ Student data science projects
рҹ“Ҳ Data visualization tools
рҹ’ј Developer portfolio projects
рҹ”® Future Enhancements

To make this even more powerful:

рҹӨ– AI-based chart recommendations
рҹҺЁ Theme customization
рҹ”җ User authentication
вҳҒпёҸ Cloud storage integration
рҹ“Ҡ Advanced analytics (filters, grouping)
рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ’» About the Developer

Saurav
Data Analyst | Frontend & Backend Developer

вӯҗ Support & Contribution

If you like this project:

вӯҗ Star the repository
рҹҚҙ Fork it
рҹӣ  Contribute
рҹ“ң License

This project is open-source and available under the MIT License.

вңЁ Final Thoughts

AI Dashboard Builder showcases how modern technologies like React and FastAPI can be combined to create powerful, scalable data tools.

ItвҖҷs a step toward building your own custom Business Intelligence platformвҖ”tailored exactly to your needs.

рҹ’¬ Open to feedback, collaboration, and opportunitiesвҖ”feel free to connect!

blogs.title: Cal-C
blogs.excerpt: A Flutter-based commercial calculator app with GST calculator, temperature converter, profit calculator, and shopkeeper notes using Provider and SharedPreferences.
blogs.content:
рҹ§® Flutter Calculator App
A Smart Business Utility App Built with Flutter

In todayвҖҷs fast-paced world, having a simple calculator is not enoughвҖ”especially for business users who need quick insights on taxes, profits, and conversions.

To solve this, I built a multi-functional commercial calculator app using Flutter, designed to handle real-world business and daily utility tasks in one place.

рҹҡҖ Project Overview

This is not just a basic calculatorвҖ”it's a complete utility toolkit that combines multiple features into a single, easy-to-use mobile application.

The app is built with a focus on:

рҹ“ұ Clean and intuitive UI/UX
вҡЎ Fast and responsive performance
рҹ§  Practical real-world functionality
вңЁ Key Features
рҹ§® 1. Basic Calculator

Perform standard arithmetic operations with a smooth and responsive interface.

рҹ’° 2. GST Calculator

A must-have feature for business users:

Instantly calculate GST
Add or remove GST from amounts
Accurate and quick results
рҹ“Ҳ 3. Profit Calculator

Designed for small business decision-making:

Calculate profit and loss
Understand margins instantly
Helps in pricing and planning
рҹҢЎ 4. Temperature Converter

Supports multiple unit conversions:

Celsius
Fahrenheit
Kelvin
рҹ“қ 5. Shopkeeper Notes

A lightweight note-saving feature:

Save important business notes
Persistent storage using SharedPreferences
Useful for daily record-keeping
рҹҸ—пёҸ Tech Stack
Technology	Purpose
Flutter	Cross-platform app development
Dart	Core development language
Provider	State management
SharedPreferences	Local data persistence

Flutter enables building high-performance apps for both Android and iOS using a single codebase.

рҹ“Ӯ Project Structure
lib/
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җ models/
в”ңв”Җв”Җ providers/
в”ңв”Җв”Җ screens/
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ calculator_screen.dart
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ gst_calculator.dart
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ profit_calculator.dart
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ temperature_converter.dart
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ notes_screen.dart
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җ widgets/
в””в”Җв”Җ main.dart
вҡҷпёҸ Installation & Setup
1пёҸвғЈ Clone the Repository
git clone https://github.com/Sauravx4/flutter-calculator-project.git
cd flutter-calculator-project
2пёҸвғЈ Install Dependencies
flutter pub get
3пёҸвғЈ Run the App
flutter run
рҹ“ұ Supported Platforms
вң… Android
вң… iOS
рҹ”„ App Workflow
User Input  
   вҶ“  
Select Tool (Calculator / GST / Profit / Converter / Notes)  
   вҶ“  
Process Data  
   вҶ“  
Display Result / Save Data  
рҹ’Ў Real-World Use Cases

This app is designed for:

рҹҸӘ Small business owners & shopkeepers
рҹҺ“ Students for quick calculations
рҹ“Ҡ Daily productivity and utility tasks
рҹ’ј Portfolio demonstration for Flutter developers
рҹ”® Future Enhancements

To make the app even more powerful:

рҹ“Ҡ Calculation history tracking
рҹҢҷ Dark mode support
вҳҒпёҸ Cloud sync for notes
рҹ“Ө Export reports (PDF)
рҹ”җ User authentication
рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ’» About the Developer

Saurav
Flutter Developer | Data Analyst | Full Stack Enthusiast

вӯҗ Support & Contribution

If you find this project useful:

вӯҗ Star the repository
рҹҚҙ Fork it
рҹӣ  Contribute to improvements
рҹ“ң License

This project is licensed under the MIT License.

рҹҷҢ Acknowledgements
Flutter community
Open-source contributors
Inspiration from real-world business tools
вңЁ Final Thoughts

This project demonstrates how a simple idea like a calculator can evolve into a powerful business utility app when combined with the right features and technologies.

ItвҖҷs a great example of building practical, user-focused applications using modern frameworks.

рҹ’¬ Feel free to connect with me for feedback, collaboration, or opportunities!

blogs.title: Customer Behaviour Analysis
blogs.excerpt: A complete Data Analytics Project focused on understanding customer behaviour through data exploration, cleaning, analysis, and visualization using Python, SQL, Power BI, and Excel.
blogs.content:
рҹ§  Customer Behaviour Analysis
Turning Raw Data into Business Insights

In todayвҖҷs data-driven world, understanding customer behaviour is not just an advantageвҖ”itвҖҷs a necessity. Businesses that leverage data effectively can optimize marketing strategies, improve customer retention, and boost revenue.

In this project, I performed a complete end-to-end data analytics workflow to uncover meaningful insights from customer data using tools like Python, SQL, Power BI, and Excel.

рҹ“Ҡ Project Objective

The goal of this project was to:

Analyze customer purchasing patterns
Segment customers based on behavior
Identify high-value customers
Generate actionable insights for business decision-making
рҹ§° Tools & Technologies Used
Tool	Purpose
рҹҗҚ Python	Data cleaning, transformation, EDA, and visualization
рҹ—ғпёҸ SQL	Data querying, aggregation, and segmentation
рҹ“Ҳ Power BI	Interactive dashboards and storytelling
рҹ“Ҡ Excel	Data validation, pivot tables, and quick analysis
рҹ“Ғ Project Architecture

The project follows a structured and scalable workflow:

Customer-Behaviour-Analysis/
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җ data/
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ raw/
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ cleaned/
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җ notebooks/
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ 01_data_cleaning.ipynb
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ 02_exploratory_analysis.ipynb
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ 03_modeling.ipynb
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җ sql/
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ customer_queries.sql
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җ reports/
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ PowerBI_Dashboard.pbix
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ Excel_Analysis.xlsx
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җ visuals/
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ dashboard_preview.png
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җ requirements.txt
в””в”Җв”Җ README.md
рҹ”Қ Step-by-Step Approach
1пёҸвғЈ Data Collection

Customer transaction and demographic data were collected from databases and CSV files.

2пёҸвғЈ Data Cleaning & Transformation

Using Pandas, I:

Handled missing values and duplicates
Standardized inconsistent formats
Converted date columns for time-based analysis
3пёҸвғЈ Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA)

With Matplotlib and Seaborn, I explored:

Customer spending distribution
Product performance
Seasonal sales trends
Correlations between variables
4пёҸвғЈ SQL-Based Analysis

Using SQL, I:

Segmented customers based on purchase behavior
Created aggregated metrics using GROUP BY
Used JOINs and window functions for deeper insights
5пёҸвғЈ Data Visualization (Power BI)

Built an interactive dashboard featuring:

рҹ“Ҳ Sales trends over time
рҹ‘Ҙ Customer segmentation (age, region, spending)
рҹӣҚпёҸ Product category performance
рҹ’° Customer Lifetime Value (CLV)
6пёҸвғЈ Excel Reporting

Created:

Pivot tables
Summary dashboards
Business-friendly reports for stakeholders
рҹ“Ҡ Key Insights

Here are some impactful findings from the analysis:

рҹ”№ Pareto Principle (80/20 Rule)

Around 20% of customers contribute to ~75% of total revenue

рҹ”№ High-Value Customer Segment

Customers aged 25вҖ“40 show the highest loyalty and repeat purchases

рҹ”№ Top Product Categories

Electronics and Home Appliances dominate recurring sales

рҹ”№ Regional Trends

Urban customers have significantly higher repeat purchase rates

рҹ’Ў Business Recommendations

Based on the insights:

рҹҺҜ Focus marketing campaigns on high-value customers
рҹ”Ғ Implement loyalty programs for repeat buyers
рҹ“Қ Target urban regions for expansion strategies
рҹӣ’ Optimize inventory for top-performing categories
рҹҡҖ How to Run This Project
git clone https://github.com/yourusername/customer-behaviour-analysis.git
cd customer-behaviour-analysis
pip install -r requirements.txt
рҹ§‘вҖҚрҹ’» About Me

Saurav
Data Analyst | Python | SQL | Power BI | Excel

рҹ“§ sauravmourya54@gmail.com

рҹ”— LinkedIn | GitHub

вңЁ Final Thoughts

This project demonstrates how raw data can be transformed into actionable business insights through a structured analytics approach.

From cleaning messy datasets to building interactive dashboards, every step plays a crucial role in telling a meaningful data story.

рҹ’¬ If you found this useful or have feedback, feel free to connect or reach out
